name: ghccoretolean-vscode
description: Runs the GHC→Lean spike pipeline on Haskell files and surfaces Blaster's verdicts as colour-coded wavy squiggles on the proven line (green = ✅ Valid, red = ❌ Falsified) plus hover on the {- @lean ... -} annotation.

ghcCoreLean.scriptPath.description: Path to transpile.sh, absolute or relative to the workspace root.

ghcCoreLean.leanDiagnosticQuietMs.description: Milliseconds of silence from the Lean LSP before considering the diagnostic stream stable.

ghcCoreLean.leanDiagnosticTimeoutMs.description: Maximum total wait time for Lean LSP diagnostics.
